hooks.command: sh -lc 'if command -v agent-switch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec agent-switch track session-start --agent codex; fi'
sh -lc 'if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -r "$HOME/.codex/hooks/agents-local.mjs" ]; then exec node "$HOME/.codex/hooks/agents-local.mjs"; fi'
sh -lc 'if command -v agent-switch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec agent-switch track prompt-submit --agent codex; fi'
sh -lc 'if command -v agent-switch >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec agent-switch track stop --agent codex; fi'
